title: CostProfileDef
description: Personality as data (ch03 §3.7, F.E.A.R.'s per-archetype database): a profile-level map of action def ID → replacement cost formula. A cowardly and an aggressive soldier share the same action set and differ only in this file.

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

overrides.description: Action def ID → cost formula override.
